title: nepeta stenantha
intro: Nepeta stenantha, also known as Dwarf Catmint, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to the mountainous regions of Greece and Turkey. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and digestive issues. The health benefits of Nepeta stenantha include reducing anxiety and stress levels, improving sleep quality, and supporting respiratory health. Nepeta stenantha can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
